About.text_1: I'm Gerardo Guzmán, a DevOps Engineer with 3 years of experience in the banking sector focused on automation, stability, and operational efficiency.
About.text_2: Currently I lead the operational transition of a SaaS core banking platform, designing hybrid CI/CD, IaC with ARM/Terraform, and secure access/secret management.
About.text_3: At Bineo (2023-2025) I built and maintained Azure DevOps pipelines, managed Azure PaaS/SaaS services, and improved monitoring with Azure Monitor while automating ops with PowerShell and Bash.
